title: Inventory and export external Cabinet app data
goal: Inventory the live external Cabinet runtime and export any non-versioned data before app decoupling, shutdown or repository rename.

approval.note: This initial authorization covers read-only runtime inventory and export planning only. Any private export write, service change, deletion or rename requires a separate reviewed effect authorization.

acceptance.assertion: Service, version, ports, data roots, configuration roots and dependent shortcuts are inventoried without exposing secrets or private runtime details in the public repository.
Non-versioned conversations, notes, memories or configuration that require preservation are exported or explicitly classified as disposable.
The private export has a path, timestamp, file inventory and hashes, while the public receipt is redacted.
Known local and remote consumers are classified before shutdown authority is requested.

metadata.source_decision: Cabinet is to become an app-independent Heimgewebe system catalog.

scope: read-only inventory of the external Cabinet app runtime on heim-pc
classification of private data categories, dependencies and preservation need without publishing contents
private export and restore planning without creating, overwriting or deleting export data
redacted receipt planning limited to classification, coverage, backup status and gaps

authorized_effects: read-only filesystem, process, service, timer, listener and configuration metadata inspection
classification of data roots, dependency classes and consumer classes
design of a bounded private backup and restore procedure
pending_effects: publication of concrete host, unit, port, listener, journal, secret or private app details
